rules.name: agent_inventory_required
rules.description: All tasks must start with agent/resource inventory.

rules.name: validator_map_required
rules.description: Task must define which agents validate output.

rules.name: qa_gate_required
rules.description: Task must have QA/integrity validation before completion.

rules.name: no_ui_before_decision
rules.description: UI cannot be modified before decision layer exists.
